task_completion.description: Verify that a new inpatient visit was started for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni patient dashboard or visit page for Valentina Torres (BAH000023) shows an active 'Inpatient' visit or admission status.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required vital signs (temperature, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, and blood pressure) were recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vitals, Observations, or Consultation section displays recorded values for temperature, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation (SpO2), and blood pressure.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two clinical diagnoses are documented, including Pneumonia and one additional relevant diagnosis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Diagnoses section lists 'Pneumonia' (or a specific type of pneumonia) and at least one other relevant diagnosis (e.g., fever, cough, hypoxemia, or respiratory distress).

task_completion.description: Verify that a clinical admission note of at least 150 characters is written, summarizing the complaint and plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Consultation or Clinical Notes section contains a detailed text entry (visibly long enough to be ~150 characters, typically 3-4 lines of text) mentioning the patient's fever, cough, breathing difficulty, and admission plan.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two appropriate inpatient medications for pneumonia treatment are prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Medications or Orders section shows at least two active prescriptions relevant to pneumonia treatment (e.g., antibiotics like Amoxicillin, Azithromycin, Ceftriaxone, and/or supportive medications like Paracetamol, Albuterol, or Oxygen).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Bahmni web interface rather than using API calls or terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Bahmni EMR interface in a web browser with visible navigation, form inputs, or confirmation messages, rather than terminal windows executing backend scripts.

integrity.description: The clinical note is organically written and not a direct copy-paste of the task description prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The admission note is written in a clinical format (e.g., '40yo F presenting with...') rather than verbatim text from the prompt ('Valentina Torres (patient identifier: BAH000023) is a 40-year-old female...').

integrity.description: The agent performed actions on the correct patient profile.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient header consistently shows 'Valentina Torres' and 'BAH000023' during data entry, ensuring data wasn't entered for a default or incorrect patient.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Valentina Torres, BAH000023, 40-year-old female. Clinical Scenario: Fever for 5 days, productive cough, difficulty breathing; suspected Community-Acquired Pneumonia. Requirements: New inpatient visit, vitals (Temp, RR, SpO2, BP), 2+ diagnoses (Pneumonia + 1 other), admission note (>=150 chars), 2+ pneumonia medications.
